appDescription: AppNexus manages App Store Connect apps with AI-powered ASO, screenshot tools, and localization for iOS/macOS. One unified dashboard for indie developers and agencies.

screens.heading: App Control Hub
screens.subheading: Info, Screenshots, AI tools — everything in one tap
screens.visualDirection: App detail screen showing version info (v1.1.5, Ready), a 2x2 feature grid (App Info, Screenshots, AI Assistant, App Store), and settings in a MORE section.
screens.imagePrompt: Generate a clean App Store feature screenshot. The uploaded iPhone UI is displayed upright and centered, filling most of the canvas on a deep navy background (#0A1628). Bold white heading 'App Control Hub' above the device, with muted blue-gray subtext 'Info, Screenshots, AI tools — everything in one tap' below. Subtle background vignette. Clean, minimal, editorial quality.
